name: --resource-group
description: The name of the Azure resource group. This resource group is a logical container for Azure resources.

name: --vault
description: The name of the backup vault (Recovery Services vault or Backup vault).

name: --container
description: The RSV protection container name. Only applicable for Recovery Services vaults.

name: --vault-type
description: The type of backup vault: 'rsv' (Recovery Services vault) or 'dpp' (Backup vault / Data Protection). Required for vault create; optional elsewhere (auto-detected if omitted).

name: --workload-type
description: Workload type: `VM`, `SQL`, `SAPHANA`, `SAPASE`, `AzureFileShare` (RSV types); AzureDisk, AzureBlob, AKS, ElasticSAN, PostgreSQLFlexible, ADLS, Azure Cosmos DB (DPP types). Also accepts aliases like AzureVM, SQLDatabase, and more.
